Name: OpenHIE Architecture
Role: The Open Health Information Mediator (Open HIM) is an interoperability layer: a software component that enables easier interoperability between disparate electronic information systems by providing a central point where the exchange of data is managed. An interoperability layer receives transactions from different information systems and coordinates the interactions between them. The Open HIM provides a layer of abstraction between systems that allows for the transformation of incoming messages to a form that the other system components expect and can support the business logic by orchestrating the transaction flow.

Name: Radical Dot
Role: Unlocking carbon from complex plastic waste Radical Dot operates at the intersection of chemical innovation and environmental sustainability. Leveraging over a decade of experience in plastics, waste management, and sustainable chemistry at Systemiq the team has developed a ground-breaking process to transform plastic waste into valuable chemical products. Headquartered in Munich, Radical Dot is hosted at TUM Venture Labs Chem SPACE, where it continues to advance its technology and impact.visit website Principal Amanda Birkenholz HQMunich Investment2025Founded2024Status Early-Stage

Name: Scenarium AI
Role: AI-powered design software for the construction industry Scenarium AI is building the AI-powered design software the construction industry is asking for - for all planners and all planning steps. It generates collision-free, completely norm-conform, and material-efficient design suggestions in minutes instead of weeks. The company was founded in 2023 by Katja Elkhanova and Emil Azadian. With their family backgrounds in construction, both founders have been familiar with the industry's challenges. Before starting Scenarium AI, Katja Elkhanova helped to build Cosuno, a construction tech startup digitizing the management of subcontractors, where she was leading the demand generation efforts. Emil Azadian built deep learning algorithms and synthetic datasets at the AI company Audatic, helping to achieve a successful exit. The two founders met at Entrepreneur First - Europe's leading talent investor.visit website Principal Alexander Kiltz HQ Investment2023Founded2023Status Early-Stage

Name: Molten Industries
Role: Clean hydrogen production Molten Industries produces low cost, clean hydrogen and solid carbon through methane pyrolysis to decarbonize the world’s chemical and heavy industries.visit website Partner Johannes von Borries HQOakland, California Investment2021Founded2021Status Early-Stage

Name: Forget Finance
Role: Holistic finance platform for Millennials The -based B2C Fin Tech company launched the first hybrid financial coaching app for saving and investing money. Bringing together financial advice from an AI bot and human experts motivates young people to make early provisions for their financial future. Over the next five years, Forget Finance aims to become the first all-in-one holistic personal finance platform.visit website Partner Johannes von Borries HQ Investment2022Founded2020Status Early-Stage

Name: Proxima Fusion
Role: Power plants via optimized stellarators Proxima Fusion is working to develop power plants via optimized stellarators, devices that form magnetic cages for high-energy matter. Proxima is the first-ever spin-out company from the Max Planck Society Institute for Plasma Physics, which built and operates the most advanced stellarator on the planet, W7-X. Research over the past decade has now set the stage for Proxima to leverage modern optimization tools and design capabilities, and accelerate fusion. With W7-X reaching high-performance in continuous operation, uniquely among fusion concepts, Proxima Fusion is catalyzing the creation of a new fusion ecosystem in Europe. Connecting partners from industry and academia, the Proxima Fusion founding team, coming together from the Max Planck Society, MIT and Google, is now entering the race for fusion energy to turn stellarators into economically viable fusion power plants.visit website Partner Benjamin Erhart HQMunich Investment2023Founded2023Status Early-Stage

Name: STABL Energy
Role: Power circuits for a next generation of battery storage systems STABL Energy makes battery storage more efficient, more safe, affordable, and allows easy re-use of second-life batteries.visit website Partner Johannes von Borries HQMunich Investment2021Founded2019Status Early-Stage

Name: Tanso Technologies
Role: End-to-end sustainability data management software for industrials Tanso Technologies enables industrial companies to become part of the solution to a lower carbon economy. The Munich-based startup aims at making sustainability accounting as integrated, transparent and verifiable as financial accounting. Tanso’s end-to-end sustainability management platform enables industrial companies to actively leverage their data in taking positive climate action and creating real business value.visit website Principal Alexander Kiltz HQMunich Investment2021Founded2021Status Early-Stage

Name: Aleph Alpha
Role: Next generation AI language models Aleph Alpha, the leading company in explainable and trustworthy generative AI applications, has raised capital and forged key strategic partnerships in a series B financing round to launch the next stage of its development in the global AI race. The consortium consisting of seven new investors is led by the Innovation Park Artificial Intelligence (Ipai), Bosch Ventures and Schwarz Group. Other new investors include -based Christ&Company Consulting, the global edge-to-cloud company Hewlett Packard Enterprise and German multinational enterprise application software company SAP, as well as investor Burda Principal Investments. Former investors complete the round. This strategic investment will further strengthen the German and European AI position for the development of sovereign AI.visit website Partner Andreas Unseld HQHeidelberg Investment2021Founded2019Status Growth

Name: HQS Quantum Simulations
Role: Predicting material properties using quantum computers HQS provides software for material scientists in the chemical industry and academia that incorporates sophisticated quantum-level models of the properties of molecules and materials. This gives researchers the deeper insights they need to identify the perfect solution.visit website Partner Benjamin Erhart HQKarlsruhe Investment2019Founded2017Status Early-Stage

Name: Dye Mansion
Role: Revolutionizing polymer 3D printing finishes As the world leader in industrial 3D printing finishing systems for polymers, Dye Mansion transforms 3D-printed parts into high-quality products like custom eyewear and automotive interiors. Founded in 2015, the company has expanded from its first industrial dyeing solution to include advanced cleaning and surfacing technologies. Their Print-to-Product workflow combines top-tier hardware with extensive color and surface options, fully compatible with Industry 4.0 standards, making them the go-to partner for future manufacturing needs.visit website Partner Benjamin Erhart HQMunich Investment2018Founded2013Status Growth

Name: Isar Aerospace
Role: Disrupting the space industry Isar Aerospace was founded in 2018 to lower the entry barriers to space. By pushing the boundaries they are opening space as a platform for future technologies and competitiveness. As a launch service provider for small and medium-sized satellites they create easy access to space for global customers. Offering the first fully privately funded European solution to meet the growing global demand, Isar Aerospace is driving commercial space across all continents.visit website Partner Prof. Dr. Helmut Schönenberger HQMunich Investment2018Founded2018Status Growth

Name: GNA Biosolutions
Role: Reliable proof of pathogens in just minutes GNA Biosolutions was a molecular diagnostics company. The technology it developed, called Pulse Controlled Amplification (PCA), is based on the molecular gold standard, polymerase chain reaction (PCR), but works much faster (minutes instead of hours) and can be used to produce small, portable, and energy-efficient devices ideal for near-patient diagnostics outside the laboratory. In February 2021, the Silicon Valley corporation Hewlett Packard acquired 100% of the company and fully integrated it into HP.visit website Partner Andreas Unseld HQMunich Investment2015Founded2010Status Exit HP Health Solutions
